MemoryVLA Perceptual + Cognitive Memory Bank (ICLR 2026) hybrid similarityinjection long-term consolidation episode tagging agent could not infer from description append (no resolution) ↗ Two-tier memory bank on a VLA backbone. Perceptual MB holds low-level visual details; Cognitive MB holds high-level semantic summaries; working-memory module retrieves and fuses both into observation tokens before action prediction. Hippocampal + semantic-gist inspiration. 84.0% success on SimplerEnv. +26 percentage-point improvement over pi-0 on long-horizon tasks. ICLR 2026. vision + sensor + text ↗ 2025-08 no releases ↗ Unlicensed ↗ 234★↗ Python searched not found ↗ 71 cites 71/yr↗ no public funding — academic research ↗ research ppl Academic/research use only↗ searched not found ↗ not applicable — not commercial not applicable — not commercial searched not found ↗ US/UK (academic) ↗ searched not found ↗ no scale claim (research) ↗ no public benchmark scores found Too recent ↗ Paper only ↗ Vision-language-action model with explicit memory layer — extends VLA with memory-of-task-state. Research-stage; eval on standard manipulation tasks. arxiv 2508.19236 GitHub
SG-Nav Online 3D scene graph (incremental spatial memory) graph graph-traversal session append-only scene-graph tagging agent could not infer from description append (no resolution) ↗ Incrementally constructs hierarchical 3D scene graph during navigation — nodes for objects/groups/rooms, edges for spatial relations. Prunes stale nodes with linear complexity. Live graph passed as structured prompt to LLM that traverses with chain-of-thought. First zero-shot method to beat supervised baselines on MP3D. >10% success-rate improvement over prior zero-shot SOTA on MP3D, HM3D, RoboTHOR. NeurIPS 2024. vision + sensor + text ↗ 2024-10 no releases ↗ MIT ↗ 325★↗ Jupyter Notebook searched not found ↗ 120 cites 60/yr↗ no public funding — academic research ↗ research ppl Academic/research use only↗ searched not found ↗ not applicable — not commercial not applicable — not commercial Open-source (MIT) ↗ China (academic) ↗ searched not found ↗ no scale claim (research navigation benchmark) ↗ no public benchmark scores found No reproductions found ↗ Paper only ↗ Scene-graph navigation — memory is a structured scene model rather than raw observation history. Meta-Memory Semantic-spatial dual-modality memory + multi-hop retrieval hybrid similaritygraph-traversal long-term extraction scene-graph tagging agent could not infer from description append (no resolution) ↗ Formalises spatial localisation question answering (SLQA). High-density memory over 3D scene graphs (semantic entities + metric coordinates); LLM agent performs joint retrieval over both modalities for multi-hop location queries. Introduces SpaceLocQA benchmark. GWM (Gaussian World Models) 3D Gaussian Splatting latent world model parametric parametric-recall session overwrite scene-graph tagging agent could not infer from description overwrite ↗ Encodes scene into 3D Gaussian Splat representations via 3D VAE; latent Diffusion Transformer predicts future Gaussian Splat states conditioned on robot actions. 3D scene representation persists across time steps as structural scene memory rather than flat features. ICCV 2025. Action-conditioned 3D video prediction; visual representation learning for imitation; neural simulator for model-based RL. vision + sensor ↗ 2025-08-25 (GWM: Towards Scalable Gaussian World Models for Robotic Manipulation; arxiv 2508.17600 submitted Aug 25… ↗ not applicable — not OSS not applicable — not OSS not applicable — no GitHub repo searched not found ↗ not applicable — not academic searched not found ↗ searched not found ↗ searched not found ↗ searched not found ↗ searched not found ↗ searched not found ↗ searched not found ↗ searched not found ↗ no scale claim (research; ICCV 2025) ↗ no public benchmark scores found not applicable — not a research paper not applicable — not a research paper Efficient world-model representation using Gaussian distributions over states. Wayve GAIA-2 / GAIA-3 Multi-view latent diffusion world model vectorkv-cache attentioncache-lookup session append-only episodekv-token opaque append (no resolution) ↗ All surround-camera views encoded through video tokeniser to continuous latent; past latent sequences serve as explicit temporal context via space-time factorised transformer.
